heading: Private Link
body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for Private Link connections at either an hourly
or monthly rate. These rates vary by region.

| AWS Region                       | Hourly Price per Connection | Monthly Price per Connection |
| -------------------------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| us-east-1 Virginia, USA          | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| us-east-2 Ohio, USA              | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| us-west-2 Oregon, USA            | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| sa-east-1 Sao Paulo, Brazil      | $0.112                      | $81.67                       |
| eu-west-1 Ireland                | $0.088                      | $63.96                       |
| eu-west-2 London, England        | $0.090                      | $65.98                       |
| eu-central-1 Frankfurt, Germany  | $0.093                      | $67.74                       |
| ap-south-1 Mumbai, India         | $0.074                      | $53.99                       |
| ap-southeast-1 Singapore         | $0.087                      | $63.49                       |
| ap-southeast-2 Sydney, Australia | $0.098                      | $71.20                       |
| ca-central-1 Canada              | $0.077                      | $54.82                       |
